phoneticUs: 藞蓴藧r蓱藧ks藢藞a蕣r蓱藧ks
examples: Geigl and her colleagues looked at 3200-year-old fossil bones belonging to a single individual of an extinct cattle species called an aurochs.
Aurochs have higher humps, longer horns and tails.
A happy pair of aurochs. The male one is really huge.
He showed me the scapula of an aurochs, an extinct forebear of domestic cattle, weighing more than two thousand pounds.
From the unique Louisiana locations to the effects used to create the Aurochs, Zeitlin is the main reason this film comes alive.
